comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  jab gaadi m saare parts lag jayenge to aapko pahle rupya Dena padega and 1week ke andar aapke bank account m paise aa jayenge
comments.author: @ajshubham6009

comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  Aap jahan se gadi liye wahan showroom jaiye and manager ko problem bataiye and wo aapko ek insurance claim wala form denge usko bhar ke usko de digiye and gaadi m jo bhi parts change karane hai uska photo le lijiye wo photo bhi manager ko bhej dijiye and gadi service centre m chorna padega parts available honge to turant thik kar ke de denge agar available nhi honge to 1week to 2week lag skte hai parts aane m
comments.author: @ajshubham6009

comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  agar available nhi hai to aap baar baar service centre m phone karke poochte rahiye ki parts aaya ki nhi
comments.author: @ajshubham6009

comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  Aap showroom ke manager ko bhi bol skte hai and service centre ke head jo honge usse bhi baat kar sakte hai ham service centre ka head jo the wahi Mera saara kuch kiya
comments.author: @ajshubham6009

comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  jab aap form fill up karenge to aapse poocha jayega gaadi m kya hua hai aur aapko accident nhi batana hai nhi to insurance claim nhi denge aapko likhna hai gaadi meri khari to aur piche se ek bike ya car wale wrong side se aakar thok ke chali gyi
comments.author: @ajshubham6009

comments.text: @akhanfromindia39  Aur aap gadi ka kagaz pattar aur insurance wala bhi paper hoga and Ghar m kisi ka driving licence lete jaiyega
comments.author: @ajshubham6009
